summary: Design a technical platform that automates tender evaluation, understands bidder eligibility, and produces explainable evaluation reports for government procurement.
key_steps: Automatic extraction of technical, financial, and compliance criteria from tender documents
Analysis of bidder submissions across various file formats
Mapping bidder evidence to each criterion
Providing page-level document references and extracted values
Routing low-confidence or ambiguous cases for officer review
Ensuring explainability, logging, and exportable audit-ready reports
optimization_claims: Reducing initial evaluation time from days to minutes
Strengthening transparency, consistency, and efficiency in government procurement
